confirm.title: Speaker Recognition App discovered
confirm.description: Connect Home Assistant to the running Speaker Recognition App?

user.title: Set up Speaker Recognition
user.description: The App is normally discovered automatically. Manual setup requires its internal URL and companion token.

add_stt.title: Add STT proxy
add_stt.description: Wrap an existing speech-to-text entity to identify the speaker while it transcribes.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Speaker Recognition App

abort.already_configured: This Speaker Recognition App is already configured
abort.reconfigured: The existing Speaker Recognition integration now uses the confirmed App

abort.not_supported: This legacy conversation proxy is no longer supported because voice recognition must not grant user permissions
